questions?

Most dreamers notice improvements in sleep quality within 3–5 days. Vivid dreams typically increase after the first week. Effects compound over time as your body builds up the mushroom extracts.
Dream Complex is formulated with all-natural, fruiting body mushroom extracts. Most people experience zero side effects. Some report vivid dreams in the first few days, which usually settles. If you're on medication, consult your doctor.
Yes. Dream Complex is designed for daily use. Many of our top dreamers take it nightly for sustained benefits. We recommend starting with 2 gummies, but you can adjust based on your preference.
100% vegan, gluten-free, and dairy-free. All ingredients are ethically sourced and third-party tested. No artificial colors, flavors, or preservatives.
We're confident you'll love Dream Complex. If you're not satisfied, we offer a 60-day money-back guarantee. No questions asked. Just reach out to support@dreamcore.shop.
